---
title: "Resources for Chapter 14: <br>Designing experiments"
author: 

output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: 
      collapsed: false
    includes:
      before_body: header_image.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

*** 

<br> 

# Chapter links

Programs to calculate power [here](http://www.divms.uiowa.edu/~rlenth/Power/).

<br> 

# Data

There are no data sets associated with Chapter 14.

Download a .zip file with all data sets in the book [here](DataZipFiles/Data.zip).
